_comment_node_id: Stable identifier for this Net Ward instance. Keep it unchanged after first deployment.
_comment_upstream_target: HTTP origin service protected by Net Ward.
_comment_listen_address: Host and port where Net Ward accepts inbound HTTP traffic. Default is localhost-only; set to 0.0.0.0:<port> only when you intend to expose Net Ward to your LAN/internet.
_comment_storage_path: SQLite database path for sources, patterns, probes, and alerts.
_comment_mirror_intensity_default: Default mirror level when a pattern does not specify one.
_comment_mesh_enabled: Mesh sharing is reserved for a later release; keep false for v0.4.1.
_comment_mesh_endpoint: Reserved mesh endpoint URL. Leave null while mesh_enabled is false.
_comment_trust_manifest_url: Reserved trust manifest URL for mesh deployments. Leave null for standalone mode.
_comment_alert_channels: v0.4.1 logs alerts to stdout. External channels are reserved for a later release.
_comment_alert_email: Reserved email destination for later alert delivery.
_comment_alert_slack_webhook: Reserved Slack webhook URL for later alert delivery.
_comment_alert_ntfy_topic: Reserved ntfy topic for later alert delivery.
